item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya menyepakati pandangan mereka tentang perlindungan hak individu.

notes: Agent A starts with clear agreement that society should take priority, then moves toward Agent B's individual-rights frame while preserving a contextual Indonesian society-policy argument. Agent B stays mostly rights-first throughout, with a bounded concession in turn 4 that US policy can ignore minority needs. Notable language artifacts: Agent B turn 2 includes non-Latin text in '保障 individu' and the odd word 'perserahan'.
